title: Extended ItemView (EIV)
description: A lightweight recipe viewer for newer Minecraft versions.
body:
# Extended ItemView

A mod all around simplifying your life by showing you the recipes you need! :D


## NOW WITH CHAT RECIPES!

In the newest version of EIV (6.1.0+1.21.11), you can share recipes with your friends by clicking on the share button located beside a recipe in the view screen. Shared recipes are displayed in chat and are fully interactive!

## Supported Functions

Currently supported functions are:

- **recipe viewing**
- **bookmarking items**
- **item-transfer** (fast-move items in crafting gui)
- **hiding/showing overlay**
- **item highlighting** (double-click on searchbar)
- **cheatmode**
- **recipe sharing (+ displayed in the chat)**

**NOTE: _Must be installed on both the client and server_**

_This mod also comes with an easy to use API. More info on the github page._

## Native supported recipes

- **_shaped crafting_**
- **_shapeless crafting_**
- **_smelting_**
- **_blasting_**
- **_smoking_**
- **_stonecutting_**
- **_campfire cooking_**
- **_smithing_**
- **_burning_**
- **_brewing_**
- **_villager trading_**
- **_entity loot_**

## Cheatmode
By holding the cheatmode keybind (by default left-alt) while clicking on items in the overlay you can cheat them if you have sufficient permission (Admin).
- Scroll to change count
- Middle-Click to instantly change count to max stack size

## Dynamic Resizing
Change between two different resize modes and make EIV fit exactly to your personal preferences

### Wrap
- Overlay-Items wrap around UI elements (e.g. potion effects, recipe book, ...)

### Cut
- The overlay width becomes smaller when there's not enough space for items
